task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface shows the 'PCR Reagents' inventory is open, visible in the page title, breadcrumbs, or inventory header.
A column header named 'Minimum Stock' is visible in the inventory table.

task_completion.description: Update the Minimum Stock value for Taq DNA Polymerase
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the inventory table row for 'Taq DNA Polymerase', the value in the 'Minimum Stock' column is '200'.

task_completion.description: Update the Minimum Stock value for dNTP Mix 10mM
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the inventory table row for 'dNTP Mix 10mM', the value in the 'Minimum Stock' column is '400'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all changes are saved and visible in the inventory table
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the inventory table in a standard viewing state (not actively editing a cell) with both the 'Minimum Stock' column and the updated values (200 and 400) clearly visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the SciNote web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the SciNote application UI being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing PostgreSQL commands, Rails console, or script executions are used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine SciNote table
integrity.visual_evidence: The table shown is the actual SciNote application interface, not a locally created HTML file, spreadsheet, or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target inventory is 'PCR Reagents'. The new column must be exactly named 'Minimum Stock'. The target items and their required 'Minimum Stock' values are 'Taq DNA Polymerase' (200) and 'dNTP Mix 10mM' (400).
